title: NACP WebSocket Relay Frame
description: Frames exchanged on the ``/ws/relay/{agent_id}`` push channel. New in NACP 1.1.1 (formalising long-standing implementation behaviour).

AuthOk.title: AUTH_OK
AuthOk.description: Server → client acknowledgement that the inbound AUTH_ACTION frame verified.

Relay.title: RELAY
Relay.description: Server → client push of an inbound NACP envelope addressed to the connected agent.

envelope.description: Canonical JSON of the original NACP envelope. Receivers MUST JSON-parse this string before verifying the signature.
